Title: An Empirical Study on Configuration-Related Code Weaknesses
Judge reason: The paper empirically studies configuration-related code weaknesses in configurable systems. It is a characterization study of code weaknesses rather than a troubleshooting technique for configuration errors.
Authors: Flávio Medeiros; Márcio Ribeiro; Rohit Gheyi; Larissa Braz; Christian Kästner; Sven Apel; Kleber Tarcísio Oliveira Santos
